title: mistxrage-2d-skin-totem
description: The MistXRage 2D Skin Totem is an exclusive texture pack designed specifically for MistXRage
body: **The [MistX Rage](https://www.youtube.com/@MistXRage) 2D Skin Totem is a custom texture pack designed exclusively for MistXRage and his community. It enhances player skins by rendering them in detailed 2D models, offering a unique and immersive experience. This pack is perfect for showcasing skins with a high-quality aesthetic, tailored specifically for MistXRage's fans to enjoy both in-game and during content creation.**
